name: Registry Relay API
source: Pulled from `registry-relay/openapi/registry-relay.openapi.json` at the pinned ref in `src/data/repo-docs.yaml` by `scripts/fetch-openapi.mjs`. The repo authors an abstract contract that uses templated paths and capability tags, not a per-deployment dump.
status: pulled at the pinned ref (build artifact, regenerated each build). Use the auth-gated `GET /openapi.json` on a running gateway for the instance-specific shape of `{dataset_id}` and `{entity}`.

name: Registry Notary API
source: Pulled from `registry-notary/openapi/registry-notary.openapi.json` at the pinned ref in `src/data/repo-docs.yaml` by `scripts/fetch-openapi.mjs`. The repo generates the spec with `cargo run -p registry-notary-bin -- openapi`.
status: pulled at the pinned ref (build artifact, regenerated each build) with federation, OID4VCI, and response examples
